title: Treating a Snakebite
content: Keep the victim calm. Immobilize the bitten area and keep it below heart level. Do not suck the venom or use a tourniquet. Seek medical help immediately.

title: Purifying Water
content: Boil water for at least 1 minute. If boiling is not possible, use water purification tablets or construct a bio-filter using sand, charcoal, and cloth.

title: Building a Lean-to
content: Find a sturdy ridgepole and lean it against a tree. Gather thick branches and lean them against the pole at a 45-degree angle. Cover with leaves and debris for insulation.

title: Earthquake Protocol
content: Drop to your hands and knees. Cover your head and neck under a sturdy table or desk. Hold on to your shelter until the shaking stops. Stay away from windows.
